7390.one_line_summary: Standard interface for vanilla options on ERC-20 tokens with time-limited exercise windows.
7390.notes: Requires ERC-1155 for fractional option ownership. Supports both call and put options with writer collateralization.

7399.one_line_summary: Standardized interface for flash loans with flexible lender and borrower architecture.
7399.notes: Successor to ERC-3156. Supports multiple assets and callback functions with fee collection.

7401.one_line_summary: Parent-controlled NFT nesting allowing tokens to own other tokens with propose-accept pattern.
7401.notes: Supersedes ERC-6059. Fixes interface ID mismatch. Enables bundling, collecting, membership, and delegation use cases.

7405.one_line_summary: Portable smart contract accounts enabling migration between wallets via ERC-1967 proxy layer.
7405.notes: Uses migration keys and time locks for security. Requires shared registry for tracking migrations.

7406.one_line_summary: Multi-namespace onchain registry with key-value mapping structure supporting versioning and versioning.
7406.notes: Enables flexible data management. Supports namespace-based data organization and history tracking.

7409.one_line_summary: Public emote repository allowing reactions to NFTs using Unicode emoji at deterministic address.
7409.notes: Supersedes ERC-6381. Uses string for emojis instead of bytes4. Supports presigned emotes and bulk operations.

7410.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling spenders to decrease allowance autonomously without owner approval.
7410.notes: Addresses security by allowing spenders to revoke excessive allowances. Nullifies infinite approvals.

7412.one_line_summary: On-demand off-chain data retrieval via oracle contracts with multicall prepending pattern.
7412.notes: Alternative to ERC-3668. Enables cross-chain reads without callback complexity. Supports fee collection.

7417.one_line_summary: Token converter enabling 1:1 conversion between ERC-20 and ERC-223 tokens with wrapper contracts.
7417.notes: Solves token standard interoperability. One ERC-223 wrapper per ERC-20 token. Supports bidirectional conversion.

7425.one_line_summary: Tokenized reserve fund extension of ERC-4626 with stakeholder governance and transparent asset tracking.
7425.notes: Enables proposal-based reserve withdrawals. Stakeholders participate through share minting.

7432.one_line_summary: Role management for NFTs with automatic expiration and custom data supporting permissioned utility sharing.
7432.notes: Roles expire automatically. Supports revocable and non-revocable roles. Includes metadata extension for role descriptions.

7439.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension preventing ticket scalping through status tracking and authorized reseller transfers.
7439.notes: Restricts transfers to authorized platforms only. Defines token statuses: Sold, Resell, Void, Redeemed.

7444.one_line_summary: Standard interface for querying maturity timestamp of time-locked assets for valuation purposes.
7444.notes: Enables Black-Scholes valuation of locked assets. Works with ERC-721 and ERC-1155 time-locked tokens.

7484.one_line_summary: Registry and adapter interface for modular smart accounts to verify module security via attestations.
7484.notes: Includes singleton registry reference implementation. Supports attester thresholds and module type validation.

7496.one_line_summary: Extension for ERC-721 and ERC-1155 enabling dynamic onchain traits with marketplace sale validation.
7496.notes: Supports multiple data types: string, decimal, boolean, epochSeconds. Includes validateOnSale property.
